about EverCool Thailand

Introducing EverCool Thailand, a new branch of Ever Cool HK and a proud sister company of Tech Free:

Solutions
We Provide

EverCool Thailand

The united way to find specialist services

Established in 1998, Ever Cool Refrigerating & Air Conditioning Co., Ltd. initially focused on HVAC and refrigerating products trading for Hong Kong and Macau markets. With the rapid growth of the Chinese market, we launched a subsidiary in China in 1999, named “Dongguan Ever Cool Equipment Co., Ltd.” This subsidiary handled HVAC product trading and system installations in China.

In 2000, we expanded further by founding “Hong Kong Tech Free Air Conditioning Technology Development Ltd.” This expansion led to the establishment of “Dongguan Tech Free Air Conditioning Mfy Ltd.,” our privately owned manufacturing factory specializing in producing Air Handlers under the brand “TECH FREE.” Our product range includes exhaust units, fresh air units, air handling units, and coils. These products gained widespread adoption in Government buildings, hospitals, pharmaceutical, and advanced technology industries.

In 2008, we enhanced our capabilities with the integration of a certified Integrated Performance Test Laboratory within our factory. In subsequent years, we secured exclusive distribution rights for “A-PLUS” and “BROAN” in Hong Kong and Macau, respectively (2015 and 2016).

New Solutions for Thailand

Choose the best solution for you!

At EverCool Thailand, our expertise lies in designing and constructing top-notch HVAC and AHU equipment tailored for commercial and industrial use. Our manufactured Coils and Heat Exchangers boast exceptional efficiency and corrosion resistance, ensuring reliable performance.

Additionally, as an authorized distributor, we extend our reach to serve customers in Bangkok and other locations in Thailand, offering premium Broan products. EverCool Thailand is your trusted partner for all your HVAC needs, backed by our legacy of excellence and innovation.
